caption: In a kitchen setting, a person's hands are shown mixing ingredients in a large grey bowl. The mixture appears to be a coarse, light-colored grain or crumb. In the background, a small white plate and a red bowl containing similar ingredients are visible on a wooden surface. The top left frame shows the hands actively stirring the mixture, while the top right frame shows them lifting and dropping the material back into the bowl. In the bottom frames, a small inset window appears in the lower left corner, showing a woman with blonde hair wearing a green shirt. The woman is speaking as the mixing continues in the main view. The text "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" is displayed in the upper left corner of every frame, accompanied by a small logo.
